news.t: Asset Allocation Summit: Opportunities in Direxion's Leveraged-Inverse Suite
Direxion Announces Date Change for Reverse Split of MUD & TSLS
Direxion Announces Reverse Split of JDST, SOXS, DUST, HIBS, MUD & TSLS

holdings.infoBox: MUD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 76.91%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 22.64%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 8.90%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 6.95%, and Cash at 0.01%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MU Bear 1X ETF (MUD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Micron Technology, Inc. stock. MUD was launched on Oct 10, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
